verse_text: For judgment is without mercy to the one who has shown no mercy. Mercy triumphs over judgment.

links.context: Judgment and mercy are bound together, but by God's grace, "mercy triumphs over judgment" ([[JAS.2:13]]). God so loved the world that the Lord Himself saved them. But note how their rebellion grieved His Holy Spirit, causing Him to turn against them.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
